title: Add is_local_mesh dst classification via RPL routing_table.lookup in Gateway forward_mesh_to_upstream
description: Per spec/05-routing.md:7.2, classify incoming mesh packets using RPL RoutingTable or router.lookup_route to determine if dst is local_mesh. Branch logic before TUN tunneling. Update Gateway struct if needed. Part of project-LICHEN-lug0.
close_reason: is_local_mesh uses rpl_node.router.lookup_route(dst).is_some() per spec; forward_mesh_to_upstream branches to mesh_to_mesh before TUN; Gateway holds RplNode; tests cover classification and mesh-to-mesh path; codereview convergence achieved in prior passes
